title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Narita Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing special... Just take a look over there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn in the direction Narita Taishin is pointing
and see a claw machine filled with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're apparently all the rage right now. Not
that I'm interested or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes see 'em dangling from other people's
bags and stuff, though.
choice_data_list: Do you want one for your bag too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? Were you even listening? I'm not
intere—
choice_data_list: But look how well-made they are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Do whatever you feel like. Just don't drag me into it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you want one so badly, get it yourself. I mean, if you can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
